common.comingSoonBody: This section is part of the Identity module and will be built in a later slice.
common.selectSection: Select a section from the menu to get started.
common.loadError: Couldn't load this data. Please try again.

twoFactor.prompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to your workspace to continue.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your workspace and email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sent: If an account exists for that workspace and email, a password reset link has been sent.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password you haven't used before.
reset.success: Your password has been updated. Please sign in.
reset.failed: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset.missingToken: This reset link is invalid or incomplete.

errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.invalid2fa: That authentication code is invalid or expired. Try the latest code.

dashboard.title: Administration Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: A scope-aware overview of your workspace.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage who can access this workspace and what they can do.

empty.title: No users found
empty.body: Try adjusting your search or filters, or invite a new user.

users.rolesHint: Assign one or more roles to grant permissions.

archiveDialog.title: Archive user
archiveDialog.message: This revokes their access and active sessions. Archived users can be restored by support.

reactivateDialog.title: Reactivate user
reactivateDialog.message: This restores the user's access to the workspace.

placement.hint: Where does this person sit in the organization?
placement.noAccess: You don't have access to the business structure.
placement.empty: No organizations yet — create your business structure first.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Track work items, assignments, and progress.

documents.hint: Link documents by reference (file storage upload arrives later).

gantt.noDatesBody: Add start/due dates to the task or its subtasks.
gantt.legend: Bars span start → due; the filled portion is progress. Red = overdue.

audit.hint: Protected compliance history — recorded automatically and never edited.

empty.title: No tasks yet
empty.body: Create your first task to get started.

workflow.title: Task Workflows
workflow.subtitle: Define status types and the statuses inside them.

empty.title: No workflows yet
empty.body: Create a workflow to start adding tasks.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Two-factor authentication, active sessions, and workspace security policy.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.subtitle: Add a second step at sign-in using an authenticator app.
twoFactor.setupHint: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, …), then enter the 6-digit code it shows. Can’t scan? Enter the setup key below manually.
twoFactor.secretLabel: Or enter this setup key manually
twoFactor.enabledMsg: Two-factor authentication is on for your account.
twoFactor.disablePrompt: Enter a current code from your authenticator to turn 2FA off.
twoFactor.invalidCode: That code didn't match. Try the latest one from your app.

policy.title: Workspace security policy
policy.subtitle: Password, lockout, and session rules applied to everyone in this workspace.
policy.requireTwoFactor: Require two-factor authentication for all members

structure.title: Business Structure
structure.subtitle: Organizations, branches, departments, and teams.
structure.archiveConfirm: Archive “{{name}}”? You can only archive a node once its children are removed.

empty.title: No organizations yet
empty.body: Create your first organization to start building your structure.

assign.title: Add member
assign.existingHint: Assign an existing user to this node.

empty.title: No members yet
empty.body: No users are placed on this node.

access.title: Access Control
access.subtitle: Define roles and the permissions they grant.
access.selectRoleBody: Choose a role on the left to view and edit its permissions.
access.systemReadonly: System roles are provided by the platform and can't be edited.

matrix.title: Permissions
matrix.subtitle: Toggle permissions and set the data scope for each.

access.deleteConfirm: Delete this role? Users assigned to it will lose its permissions.

audit.title: Audit & Activity
audit.subtitle: An append-only record of important actions in this workspace.

empty.title: No activity found
empty.body: No audit events match your current filters.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal details, password, and active sessions.

password.title: Change password
password.changed: Password changed. Other sessions have been signed out.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.subtitle: Devices currently signed in to your account.

errors.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.genericBody: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

hero.title: Run your entire business on one platform.
hero.lead: Finance, sales, inventory, HR, projects and fleet — unified in a single multi-tenant system of record. Built for Saudi compliance, designed for clarity.
hero.trust: Trusted by 600+ finance & operations teams across the GCC

landing.band: Powering finance & operations teams across the Kingdom

modules.title: Every part of the business, talking to every other part.
modules.subtitle: No more disconnected spreadsheets and point tools. One data model, shared across finance, operations, sales and HR.

items.name: General Ledger
items.desc: Chart of accounts, journals, period close, and live financial statements — the engine every module posts to.

items.name: Sales & Invoicing
items.desc: Standard, simplified and credit-note invoices with ZATCA QR signing and Fatoorah submission tracking.

items.name: Inventory
items.desc: Multi-warehouse stock, valuation by FIFO or weighted average, and automated reorder alerts.

items.name: CRM & Pipeline
items.desc: Capture leads, manage opportunities through a visual pipeline, and convert won deals to customers.

items.name: HR & Payroll
items.desc: Employee lifecycle, attendance, leave, and GOSI-compliant monthly payroll that posts straight to the GL.

items.name: Fleet & Vehicles
items.desc: Track assignments, fuel, maintenance and renewals — with alerts before any registration expires.

platform.title: One login. Many companies. Total isolation.
platform.subtitle: A holding group can run every subsidiary from a single deployment. Our architecture scopes every record to a workspace and cluster — so the Riyadh team never sees Jeddah's data, unless you say so.

features.name: Cluster-level permissions
features.desc: Assign a user different roles per cluster — Accountant in Riyadh, read-only in Jeddah.

features.name: Action-based RBAC
features.desc: Roles bundle granular actions per module — view, create, post, approve, export.

features.name: Complete audit trail
features.desc: Every record carries workspace and cluster context, logged for full traceability.

compliance.title: E-invoicing that just works with Fatoorah.
compliance.subtitle: Generate compliant tax invoices with cryptographic signing, embedded QR codes, and real-time clearance status. No bolt-ons, no middleware — it's native to the invoicing module.
compliance.invoiceScan: Scan to verify on the ZATCA Fatoorah portal.

cta.title: Ready to see it on your numbers?
cta.subtitle: Spin up a workspace in minutes. Invite your team and start working.

footer.tagline: The unified business platform for finance and operations teams across the GCC.

account.title: Create your account
account.subtitle: Start your free trial. No credit card required.

pwHint.weak: Use 8+ characters with mixed case and a number.
pwHint.good: Good — add a symbol for a stronger password.
pwHint.strong: Strong — 8+ chars with uppercase, number & symbol.

workspace.title: Set up your workspace
workspace.subtitle: A workspace is your company's isolated tenant.
workspace.name: Company / workspace name
workspace.slugHint: This is the workspace name your team will use to sign in.

review.title: Review & create
review.subtitle: Confirm the details below. You can change anything later in Settings.
review.agree: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

success.title: Check your inbox
success.subtitle: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}. Confirm your email to activate your workspace, then sign in.

errors.slugTaken: That workspace address is already taken. Please choose another.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.agreeRequired: Please accept the terms to continue.

verifyEmail.successBody: Your workspace is active. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.failBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
verifyEmail.missingToken: This verification link is missing its token.
